CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.ParentId)), HYPERLINK("/" & Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.ParentId, Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Name, "_self"), IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Parent.Parent.Parent.ParentId)), HYPERLINK("/" & Parent.Parent.Parent.ParentId, Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Name, "_self"), IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Parent.Parent.ParentId)), HYPERLINK("/" & Parent.Parent.ParentId, Parent.Parent.Parent.Name, "_self"), IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Parent.ParentId)), HYPERLINK("/" & Parent.ParentId, Parent.Parent.Name, "_self"), IF( NOT(ISBLANK(ParentId)), HYPERLINK("/" & ParentId, Parent.Name, "_self"), NULL ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: There is a maximum of 5 levels in the account hierarchy.
CustomField.label: Ultimate Parent Company
